lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical issues and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All components are in original, like-new condition.

Here’s a fantastic opportunity for a DIY enthusiast or someone looking for a dedicated project car! This vehicle is being offered at a great price for those ready to roll up their sleeves. While it definitely needs some mechanical work and cosmetic TLC to get back to its best, it’s a solid foundation for someone who loves a restoration challenge. Grab a bargain and make this car your own!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, with only minor stone chips on the front bumper and a few light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the upholstery shows very little wear, and all electronic features are fully operational. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly and has a documented history of regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. It is a solid, reliable vehicle that is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being offered strictly as-is, ideally for parts or a complete restoration project. It currently experiences significant mechanical failures, including a failing transmission and engine issues that make it non-drivable. The body has extensive rust, and the interior shows heavy wear and damage from years of use. Potential buyers should be prepared to tow the vehicle and expect a major mechanical overhaul if they intend to return it to the road.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any damage or imperfections. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.

We are pleased to offer this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a sophisticated balance of performance and value. Having undergone a thorough multi-point inspection, this model exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a refined aesthetic. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes a proven service history and enduring quality.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It’s been such a reliable ride and is still in really wonderful shape! It’s super clean, runs smoothly, and has plenty of life left for all your upcoming road trips. I’ve truly loved driving this beauty, and I know you will too. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving performance through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. The chassis has been maintained with a focus on structural integrity, including reinforced rear subframe mounting points and refreshed bushings to ensure precise handling. Recent mechanical work includes a comprehensive valve clearance adjustment and a cooling system overhaul. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, the powertrain remains robust with linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. A mechanically sound example ready for the technical driver.
Good condition. Reliable daily driver. Clean title. Well-maintained interior. Recent oil change. Service records available.

This meticulously cared-for vehicle strikes the ideal balance between everyday utility and refined comfort. The exterior maintains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the slight, honest signs of road use one would expect from a car that has been loved. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean, featuring well-preserved seating and a fully functional suite of modern tech. Mechanically, it is in excellent health, boasting a consistent service history that ensures a smooth, quiet ride and responsive handling. This is a dependable, high-quality choice for anyone seeking a turn-key driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and sustained performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, confirming its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a superior driving experience for those seeking a balance of value and quality. This offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a dependable asset at a competitive valuation.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Maintained to a rigorous standard, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. Every component has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our dealership's exacting requirements for performance and reliability. A sophisticated choice for those who demand excellence without compromise.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a reliable companion! It’s in wonderful shape, super clean inside and out, and drives like a dream. It’s perfect for someone looking for a solid, well-cared-for car that’s ready to hit the road today. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it! ✨

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual gearbox. The mechanical health is prioritized, with the double-VANOS system recently serviced and the rear subframe reinforced to ensure chassis rigidity. Power is delivered through a factory limited-slip differential, while the suspension has been upgraded with Bilstein dampers and refreshed polyurethane bushings for enhanced turn-in response. Though showing minor aesthetic wear consistent with its mileage, the drivetrain remains robust and the throttle mapping provides the visceral, linear engagement synonymous with the M-division's peak naturally aspirated era.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Title in hand.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and preservation, maintained with a focus on longevity and aesthetic appeal. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, with only minor, expected signs of use such as faint stone chips on the front fascia that do not detract from its striking presence. Inside, the cabin remains a refined environment; the leather seating is supple with minimal creasing on the driver’s bolster, and the dashboard remains free of any sun damage or cracks. Every electronic component, including the premium sound system and integrated navigation, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. The engine pulls strongly without hesitation, and the transmission shifts are crisp and seamless. It delivers a quiet, composed ride that speaks to its careful ownership history. This is a turnkey example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This unit has been maintained to rigorous standards, ensuring that both mechanical performance and structural integrity remain uncompromised. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated experience coupled with enduring value.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies a superior standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a rigorous professional assessment, it offers a refined driving experience and a well-documented history of diligent maintenance. This represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting with my favorite ride and it's looking for a new home! This car has been so reliable and still looks fantastic on the road. It’s been well-loved and runs beautifully, making it the perfect companion for your daily commutes or weekend adventures. It’s in really solid shape and ready to go today—come see why I’ve enjoyed it so much!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and 8,000 RPM redline. The powertrain is mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery and mechanical grip. Essential preventative maintenance has been addressed, including subframe reinforcement and a VANOS system refresh. The chassis remains composed with upgraded Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings, providing sharp turn-in and minimal lateral roll. While the aesthetics show honest patina consistent with a well-enjoyed enthusiast vehicle, the mechanical vitals and compression ratios remain strong.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Non-smoker.

This meticulously maintained 2018 sports coupe offers a perfect balance of performance and refinement. The exterior features a deep, metallic finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is a testament to quality, with supple leather seating, a pristine dashboard, and all electronic features—including the premium sound system and navigation—functioning flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and robust, backed by a comprehensive service history and recent professional inspection. The vehicle has been garage-kept, smoke-free, and recently fitted with a fresh set of high-performance tires. It drives straight and true, providing a smooth yet spirited experience that makes it an ideal choice for both daily commutes and weekend escapes. This is a reliable, well-cared-for machine ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value, standing as a testament to responsible ownership and disciplined maintenance.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. Thoroughly inspected by our senior technicians, this unit offers a seamless driving experience and remains in commendable condition throughout. It serves as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking both longevity and sophisticated engineering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride and it’s looking for a new adventure! It’s been super reliable and well-taken care of, so it's still in really solid shape for its next owner. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I'm sad to see it go, but I know you'll love it as much as I have! Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains composed thanks to a reinforced rear subframe and an upgraded Bilstein suspension setup, ensuring peak lateral grip. Maintenance is up to date, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing service, preserving the mechanical integrity of its 8,000 RPM redline. Equipped with a factory limited-slip differential and staggered Style 67 wheels, this M3 offers a pure analog connection to the road with consistent compression across all cylinders.
Used vehicle in good condition. Engine runs smooth. Interior is clean. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and value. On the exterior, the paint retains a deep luster, showing only the minor road wear and small stone chips you’d expect from a well-loved daily driver. Inside, the cabin has been meticulously cared for; the leather upholstery is supple with no tears, and all electronic features—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health. It has been serviced regularly, with a recent oil change and a fresh set of tires installed last season. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a confident and comfortable driving experience. Whether you’re commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready for the road ahead without needing immediate investment.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it exhibits commendable mechanical integrity and a well-preserved exterior. A premier choice for the professional seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience.
